subcodes.first_line: O thou verdant, fresh, and radiant leaf! Were we to weep and moan for a hundred thousand years at this Supreme Affliction
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه خضره نضره مستبشره از مصیبت کبری اگر صدهزار سال ناله و فغان کنیم و آه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action
